# Implement Full RRULE Support for Recurring Events

## Description
Currently, the AI agent can create basic events but lacks support for recurring events with complex patterns. We need to implement full RRULE (RFC 5545) support to handle recurring events like "every Monday at 9am" or "every other week on Tuesday".

## Type
- **Type:** New Feature
- **Priority:** High
- **Component:** AI Agent
- **Milestone:** AI Agent v1.1

## Use Case
When a user says "Schedule a team meeting every Monday at 9am for the next 3 months", the AI should:
1. Parse the recurring pattern
2. Create a recurring event with proper RRULE
3. Generate all instances within the specified timeframe
4. Handle exceptions and modifications

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Support for basic recurring patterns (daily, weekly, monthly, yearly)
- [ ] Support for complex patterns (every other week, specific days of week)
- [ ] Support for end conditions (until date, after N occurrences)
- [ ] Handle recurring event modifications
- [ ] Support for recurring event exceptions
- [ ] Proper database storage and retrieval
- [ ] AI agent can understand and create recurring events

## Technical Requirements
- [ ] Implement RRULE parsing library (e.g., `rrule.js`)
- [ ] Update database schema to support recurring events
- [ ] Modify AI tools to handle recurring event creation
- [ ] Add recurring event management tools
- [ ] Update chat UI to show recurring event indicators

## Implementation Notes
- Use `rrule.js` for RRULE parsing and generation
- Store base event with RRULE string in database
- Generate instances on-demand or pre-generate for performance
- Consider timezone handling for recurring events
